channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘Pulp Fiction’ Star Peter Greene Died From Accidental Gunshot Wound
item.description: Peter Greene fatally shot himself ... TMZ has learned. The Office of the Chief Medical Examiner in New York City tells us Peter's official cause of de...

item.title: Michael Rubin Staffer Arrested at L.A. Home for Alleged Grand Theft
item.description: Michael Rubin's got an alleged crook under his roof ... or, at least he did, until she was hauled out of his Hollywood Hills mansion in handcuffs ... ...

item.title: Rapper Lil Poppa Dead at 25
item.description: Lil Poppa -- a popular rapper based out of Jacksonville, Florida -- has died ... TMZ has learned. The Fulton County Medical Examiner's Office in Georg...

item.title: Shia LaBeouf's Behavior While Shooting New Movie Concerned Some on Set
item.description: Shia LaBeouf was arrested in New Orleans this week on two counts of simple battery charges ... and TMZ has learned some colleagues were concerned abou...

item.title: Avan Jogia Helps TMZ Producer to Her Feet After Dramatic Tumble, on Video
item.description: Avan Jogia’s soooo ridiculously fine, he had our field producer Seleah Bussey falling for him -- literally (!!!) -- and yes, we got the dramatic mid-i...

item.title: An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
Sylvester Stallone's Best Acting Isn't In Rocky But Is In This '80s Action Movie
Billy Bob Thornton's Villain Stole This Infamous 1990s Action Movie With Only 3 Minutes Of Screentime
